images.title: Endophloeus markovichianus (Piller & Mitterpacher, 1783) lateral view (23150294085).png
images.description:
Family: Colydiidae Size: 6,6 mm (4,0 to 7,0 mm) Origin: South Europe, Southeast Europe Ecology: on dry leaves wood under moss, lichen and bark Location: France, Corsica, Bastia, 10 km S Moriani leg. Bayer, 20.VIII.1998; det. Schuh, 2004

Photo: U.Schmidt, 2015
